note: Session-start health check. The shape of its output is stable: any change is either intentional or a regression.
System vitals probe. Verifies that the dependency resolver, doctor script, and layer checks produce a consistent status shape.
Voice first-win pipeline (tier-0, zero external deps). Regression in this pipeline blocks the D1 first-win KPI.
Provider discovery probe. The set of discovered providers and their health shape must stay stable across releases.
Representative analysis pipeline. Verifies that the analysis brief output structure does not regress.
Governance audit pipeline. Changes to the audit output schema are breaking for compliance tooling.
Artifact collection pipeline. The artifact manifest shape is a public contract.
Meeting facilitation pipeline. Key output: facilitation_plan, action_items shape.
Voice profile setup pipeline. Verifies that the learning brief output is structurally stable.
Web concept builder pipeline. Represents the project-bootstrap family output shape.
